metadata.name: Trade Table
metadata.source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules 3e pp.79-80 — VERIFIED Mar 22, 2026
metadata.notes: Roll for each crew member Trading. 3 credits for additional rolls (requires at least 1 crew Trading).

entries.name: A personal weapon
entries.effect: Roll once on the Low Tech Weapon Table (p.28)

entries.name: Sell some cargo
entries.effect: Earn 2 credits

entries.name: Find something useful
entries.effect: Roll once on the Gear Table (p.29)

entries.name: Quality food and booze
entries.effect: Recruit a new character

entries.name: Instruction book
entries.effect: +1 XP to crew member of choice

entries.name: Bits of scrap
entries.effect: Earn 1 credit

entries.name: Medical pack
entries.effect: Choice of Stim-pack or Med-patch

entries.name: Worthless trinket
entries.effect: Roll 1D6, on 6: +1 story point

entries.name: Local maps
entries.effect: If Quest received this or next world, add 1 Rumor

entries.name: Luxury trinket
entries.effect: +2 to Recruit roll, OR sell (roll twice on Trade Table). Swift keeps for +2 XP

entries.name: Basic supplies
entries.effect: Skip Upkeep for 1 turn

entries.name: Contraband
entries.effect: Accept: earn 1D6 credits, on 4-6 also gain a Rival

entries.name: Gun Upgrade Kit
entries.effect: Choice of Laser Sight, Bipod, or Beam Light

entries.name: Useless trinket
entries.effect: Roll 1D6, on 6: +1 story point

entries.name: Trade goods
entries.effect: On each new planet, roll 1D6 for sell value. On 1: worthless

entries.name: Something interesting
entries.effect: Roll once on the Loot Table

entries.name: Fuel
entries.effect: Roll 1D6: that many credits of fuel for travel costs

entries.name: Spare parts
entries.effect: +1 to Repair attempt. Natural 1 uses them up

entries.name: Tourist garbage
entries.effect: Roll 1D6, on 5-6: +1 story point

entries.name: Don't usually see these for sale
entries.effect: Pay 3 credits, roll on Loot Table. Item for trading crew member only

entries.name: Ordnance
entries.effect: 3 grenades (Frakk or Dazzle, any combination)

entries.name: Basic firearms
entries.effect: Choice of Handgun, Colony Rifle, or Shotgun

entries.name: Odd device
entries.effect: Pay 1 credit, roll 1D6. On 6: Loot Table roll. Otherwise garbage

entries.name: Military fuel cell
entries.effect: Zero travel costs to next planet

entries.name: Hot tip
entries.effect: Gain 1 Quest Rumor

entries.name: Insider information
entries.effect: Auto-obtain Patron next turn if searching

entries.name: Army surplus
entries.effect: Choice of Auto Rifle, Blast Pistol, or Glare Sword

entries.name: A chance to unload some stuff
entries.effect: Sell weapons for 2 credits each (undamaged only)

entries.name: A lot of blinking lights
entries.effect: Roll once on the Gear Loot subtable

entries.name: Gently used
entries.effect: Roll once on the Gear Loot subtable (item damaged, needs Repair)

entries.name: Pre-owned
entries.effect: Roll once on the Loot Table (item damaged, needs Repair)

entries.name: Medical reserves
entries.effect: 2 Stim-packs and 2 Med-patches

entries.name: Starship repair parts
entries.effect: Count as 1D6 credits for Hull Point repair
